title: Senior Financial Analyst - RBL Bank Asia Pacific Associates - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - RBL Bank Asia Pacific Associates - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
Join the RBL Bank Asia Pacific Associates family as a Senior Financial Analyst in Delhi. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About RBL Bank Asia Pacific Associates:
RBL Bank Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Company-sponsored certifications
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with RBL Bank Asia Pacific Associates!
